description: KOOOGEAR White Black No Show Socks, Non-Slip Invisible Trainer Sports Walking Socks Womens 4-7, Ladies Women Anti Blister Cushioned Breathable Cotton Socks with Silicone Stripes 3 Pairs. Size: 4-8 UK Size Weight: about 25g/pair Features: 1.Main Fabric 81% Cotton, 16% Polyamide Fibre, 3% Spandex , which designed for outdoor sports socks. Our sports socks are more comfortable, breathable and resistant to blisters, and can keep your feet dry and odorless all day long. 2.The heel is Y-shaped design, the hose and underfoot area with wicking cotton thick cushion. It protects the foot from shear and prevents painfu blisters. Providing perfect foot comfort during trainning, running or any other outdoor sports. 3.Non-slip silicones will be firmly attached to the heel and will not slip even if pulled with gravity!. 4.The elastic band has good elasticity, so socks can be suitable for different foot types. Whether you are big foot or small foot. Warm Tips: 1.The water temperature during cleaning does not exceed 40°C. 2.Washing: Machine Wash/ Hand Wash (suggest using wash bag). Don't iron and bleach. Please Note: 1. Due to the light and screen setting difference, the item's color may be slightly different from the pictures. 2. 0.5-1 cm tolerance of dimension and length difference among due to manual measurement.
